texts.t002: Insulated sandwich-panel sectional doors and residential garage doors with SIE16/SIE36 ceiling openers — quiet belt drives, battery backup and smartphone control.
texts.t012: 40 mm PU-insulated steel panels in woodgrain and RAL finishes, torsion-spring balanced for one-finger manual use.

texts.t014: Panel-stacking doors for openings where headroom or side room is limited.

texts.t016: Are sectional doors safe for homes?
texts.t017: Yes — spring-break safety, finger-safe panel joints and auto-reverse on obstruction are standard on our residential range.
texts.t025: GI, aluminium, polycarbonate & India's only 100% Indian-make full-length transparent shutter.
